scope: Typed runtime/API error UX, OpenAI-compatible error classification, validation-error rendering, system API retry rendering, and AgenC code-hint parsing for shell output.

requiredBehaviors: Expose typed runtime, SDK, shell, config, abort, API, retry, and media/context error helpers from AgenC-owned runtime paths.
Preserve abort detection, errno extraction, short stack formatting, SDK assistant-message error mapping, and axios-shaped error classification.
Format API errors with connection, timeout, SSL, auth, prompt-too-long, media-size, retryable, and overload categories.
Bridge legacy live LLM API imports to the canonical runtime API error class instead of maintaining a second incompatible hierarchy.
edgeCases: Nested API error bodies without a top-level message.
Connection errors whose useful code is on a nested cause.
Secret-bearing API messages with bearer tokens, authorization headers, cookies, or sk-prefixed keys.

requiredBehaviors: Classify local OpenAI-compatible network failures by errno, localhost resolution, connection refusal, timeouts, DNS, TLS, and generic fetch failure.
Classify HTTP failures by model not found, endpoint not found, context overflow, unsupported tool calls, auth, rate limit, server overload, and malformed success bodies.
Embed and recover stable category markers in user-facing OpenAI-compatible provider errors.
Map live provider transport failures and malformed successful JSON responses through the classifier instead of leaving those paths as generic errors.
edgeCases: Nested cause chains on TypeError fetch failures.
Localhost URLs that should produce local-server remediation hints.
2xx responses with malformed JSON from self-hosted providers.

requiredBehaviors: Type system API retry messages instead of leaving them as any.
Render late retry attempts with formatted API error text, retry countdown, and timeout hint text.
Render validation errors grouped by file with nested path trees and de-duplicated suggestions.
Route live settings and doctor validation surfaces to the AgenC-owned validation list component.
edgeCases: Early retry attempts stay quiet to avoid noisy transient errors.
Long API error text is capped outside verbose mode.
Indexed invalid config values render as readable keys in the validation tree.

requiredBehaviors: Parse AgenC-owned hint tags with version, type, value, and source-command metadata.
Strip whole-line hint tags from shell output before model-visible content is assembled.
Carry parsed hints in structured bash result metadata for direct, shell, and shell-wrapper paths.
edgeCases: Unsupported versions, unsupported types, empty values, and inline quoted tags are ignored.
Hint stripping happens before output truncation so partial tag prefixes cannot leak.
The pending-hint store remains single-slot and once-per-session.

carriedBehavior: Runtime error primitives now live under runtime/src/errors and include abort, errno, SDK assistant-message, axios-shaped, API-formatting, SSL/TLS, prompt-too-long, media-size, and retryable-error helpers.

The OpenAI-compatible provider imports the canonical runtime classifier and keeps stable category markers for actionable self-hosted provider failures, including live transport and malformed-success response paths.
The system API retry message is typed through runtime/src/types/message.ts and rendered by the AgenC-owned TUI component from the live system-message path.

Validation error rendering builds nested trees from dot paths, replaces invalid indexed leaves with readable invalid values, sorts files, de-duplicates suggestions, and is wired into the live settings/doctor callers.
AgenC code hints use the AgenC tag name and debug prefix, strip from bash output before truncation, and are surfaced as structured metadata while preserving the single-slot pending store.
intentionalReductions: Plugin marketplace prompting, persisted show-once config, and install dialogs are not wired in this item because the cited hint source only owns parser/store behavior and the live AgenC plugin recommendation UI is still confined to the temporary upstream mirror.
The React/Ink validation component is ported to a local AgenC tree renderer and local Ink exports instead of importing from the temporary upstream mirror.
The system API error renderer keeps the small response prefix and expansion hint inline so the new component does not grow production dependencies on the temporary upstream mirror.
The stale compact OpenAI-compatible classifier under runtime/src/llm/_deps was removed instead of kept as a forwarding module, because re-export shims are forbidden.
conflictResolutions: No merge conflict was present after merging main into the worktree for this iteration.
